name: Quaker Chewy Choc-Oat-Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add the sugar, eggs, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt (if using); mix until just combined.
5. Fold in the oats, chocolate pieces, and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 9-10 minutes for chewy cookies or 12-13 minutes for crisp cookies.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack.
9. Let cool completely.
BAR FORM:
1. Press the dough into an ungreased 13x9 inch baking pan.
2. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
3. Cool completely before cutting into bars.
4. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 32 bars.
